step1.title: The basics
step1.description: A few details help us set up your plan with the right targets from the start.

step2.title: Shape your plan
step2.description: Pick the preferences and pace that feel realistic for everyday life.
step2.preferencesHelper: Choose any that matter to you. Leave it blank if you want to keep things open.
step2.calorieDeficitHelper: A lighter adjustment is easier to sustain. You can fine-tune this later.
step2.calorieSurplusHelper: A steadier increase keeps the plan easier to follow over time.

step3.title: Health details
step3.description: Share anything we should keep in mind. You can also leave this for later.
step3.notesPlaceholder: Anything that would help us keep your plan practical and safe.

step4.title: Make it yours
step4.description: Pick the kind of support that feels most natural. You can always adjust it later.
step4.notePlaceholder: Anything else you'd like the assistant to keep in mind?
step4.disclaimer: Assistant guidance is informational and does not replace medical advice.

activity.sedentary: Little or no structured exercise most days.
activity.light: Light workouts or regular walks a few times a week.
activity.moderate: A balanced mix of movement or training through the week.
activity.active: Hard training or a physically active routine most days.
activity.very_active: Very demanding training or physical work on top of daily life.

goalDescription.maintain: Keep your intake steady and consistent.

styleDescription.none: Balanced guidance with no extra preference.
styleDescription.concise: Short, clear replies that stay focused on the next step.
styleDescription.friendly: A warmer tone with a bit more encouragement.
styleDescription.detailed: More context when you want to understand the why.

focusDescription.mealPlanning: Help with planning meals that fit your targets.
focusDescription.analyzingMistakes: Notice patterns that might be slowing progress.
focusDescription.motivation: Offer more encouragement when consistency feels harder.

skipOnboardingModal.title: Skip setup for now?
skipOnboardingModal.body: You can finish onboarding later from your profile. For now, we'll take you straight into the app.

skipStepModal.title: Skip this step?
skipStepModal.step3Body: You can add health details later if you want us to factor them in.
skipStepModal.step4Body: You can personalize assistant tone and focus later from your profile.

exitRefillModal.title: Save changes before leaving?
exitRefillModal.body: You can save what you've updated so far or leave without applying these edits.

errors.ageInvalid: Enter a valid age between 16 and 120
errors.heightInchInvalid: Inches need to stay between 0 and 11
